case_title: NISSIM LANYADOO VS. DAVID J. ORTEGA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-04-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/RWoods; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF NISSIM LANYADOO is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to FEB-02-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
